title: Windows Forensics: Exchange ProxyShell — Live EMS
description: EXCH-01 (Exchange 2019 CU12, never patched) is dropping CFO and HR mailboxes as .pst onto a public path. ProxyShell exploit chain. Connect, walk Get-MailboxExportRequest + Get-IISAccessLog + Get-ChildItem, lock down the IOCs.

hints.text: `connect exch-01`. Start with `Get-MailboxExportRequest` — Exchange admins almost never run these manually.
`Get-IISAccessLog | include autodiscover` — ProxyShell's tell is a URL containing `?@<DOMAIN>/Powershell` against the AutoDiscover endpoint.
`Get-ChildItem C:\inetpub\wwwroot\aspnet_client\system_web` — the dropped .aspx and the .pst exports are co-located there.
